text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Inhale, exhale... The day is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Inhale, exhale... Just you watch, Trainer. This time, I'm taking home first...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
No. I'm just taking deep breaths so I don't get
worked up and have a nosebleed.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Today's race is an important chance to redeem
myself. The last thing I want is to have to
withdraw because my nose is bleeding.
choice_data_list: Ah, I see... Good luck out there!
